---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new skill or improvement to an existing one
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your request related to a problem?

A clear description of what the problem is. E.g., "I'm always stuck when..."

## Describe the solution

A clear description of what you'd like to see — a new skill, or an improvement to an existing one.

## Skill category

- [ ] New novelty engine
- [ ] New reviewer persona
- [ ] Improvement to existing skill
- [ ] Tooling / CI / infrastructure
- [ ] Documentation

## Additional context

Any examples, references, or prior art that inspired this request.
